expectations.text: Iterates using the write → recalculate → read pattern multiple times to converge on the answer
expectations.evidence: The with_skill outputs directory contains only idfa_compliant_model.xlsx — no transcript or results file to verify iterative pattern.

expectations.text: Writes Inp_Rev_Y1 values via idfa-ops write command (not manual cell edits)
expectations.evidence: No transcript or results file in with_skill/outputs/ to verify idfa-ops write usage.

expectations.text: Reads EBITDA_Y3 via idfa-ops read command after each recalculation
expectations.evidence: No transcript or results file to verify read commands.

expectations.text: Converges to a solution within 1% tolerance of the $3,500,000 target
expectations.evidence: No results output to verify convergence.

expectations.text: Leaves the final solved value written in the model (does NOT revert to the original 10M)
expectations.evidence: Cannot verify the xlsx file contents without opening it — no text output confirms the final value.

expectations.text: Reports the required Inp_Rev_Y1 value and the resulting EBITDA_Y3, both read from the model
expectations.evidence: No results markdown was produced in with_skill/outputs/.
